title: Chewy Sweet Australian Fennel Stew
description: A comforting low-sodium stew that balances the natural sweetness of fennel with warm spices and creamy coconut milk, perfect for a hangover cure.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 4 minutes.
Incorporate minced garlic, sliced carrot, and zucchini; cook for another 3 minutes.
Add the cubed fennel and stir for 2 minutes to toast slightly.
Stir in thyme, cumin, and smoked paprika, cooking for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in coconut milk and low‑sodium vegetable broth, then add maple syrup and lemon juice.
Bring the mixture to a gentle boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the fennel is tender yet chewy.
Taste and adjust seasoning without adding salt; if needed, add a pinch of salt or more lemon juice to balance.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh herbs or a squeeze of lemon.
Enjoy this soothing, low‑sodium stew as a comforting lunch or dinner to help recover from a night out.
